metadata.name: Analyze Plant Stand Count from Drone Imagery

description: Shortly after emergence, a farmer flies a drone over a corn field and needs the agent to count the plants to assess germination success.

nodes.task_description: Process the high-resolution drone imagery of the field.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a map of the field.

nodes.task_description: Run an image recognition model to identify and count each individual corn seedling.

expected_outcome.value: The model counts the plants and calculates the plant population per acre.

nodes.task_description: Generate a map showing the variation in plant population across the field, highlighting areas with poor emergence.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a map that clearly shows problem areas.
